title: ipomoea deppeana
intro: Ipomoea deppeana, also known as the pink morning glory, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the morning glory family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and its potential to act as an antiseptic and antispasmodic. The health benefits of Ipomoea deppeana include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
